The consecutive years she finished in the top 10 are 2001, 2002, 2005, 2006, and 2007. The year 2011 is not included because there is no position data (denoted by '–'). 

There were multiple occurrences in years like 2005 and 2006 where she finished in the top 10 more than once, but we count each year only once when determining consecutive years. 

Thus, the consecutive years are: 2001, 2002, 2005, 2006, and 2007, making it a total of 5 distinct consecutive years where she finished in the top 10.
